name: bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient categorization of expense receipts causes time wastage. We convert receipt photos into categorized entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.
problem_solved: Inefficient categorization of expense receipts leads to time wastage.
features: export to CSV for bookkeeping software

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient categorization of expense receipts leads to time wastage.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient categorization of expense receipts causes time wastage. We convert receipt photos into categorized entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual entry of receipts into accounting software
must_have_features: export to CSV for bookkeeping software

one_liner: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient categorization of expense receipts causes time wastage. We convert receipt photos into categorized entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.
